creator: jasonmader@gmail.com
text:
Not sure if this is an expected behavior, but traceroute6 doesn't show the ::ffff:10.255.252.149 responses, even though FreeBSD 13.0 appears to be receiving them.

# traceroute6 -n www.google.com
...
 2  * * *

17:31:09.673870 IP6 (hlim 250, next-header ICMPv6 (58) payload length: 152) ::ffff:10.255.252.149 > freebsd: [icmp6 sum ok] ICMP6, time exceeded in-transit for iad66s02-in-x04.1e100.net
